title: Linux Bind Shell Listener
description: Detects creation of bind shell listeners using netcat, socat, or ncat. Bind shells open a listening port that allows remote attackers to connect and execute commands.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*nc -lvp*' or msg like '*nc -lp*' or msg like '*ncat -lvp*' or msg like '*ncat -lp*' or msg like '*netcat -lvp*')) or (msg like '*socat TCP-LISTEN*'))
falsepositives: Network troubleshooting using netcat in listen mode
